suite.name: Lecture Delivery Kernel v0 Eval Suite

testCases.title: LectureProblem ingestion preserves problem identity
testCases.expectedBehavior: ingestProblem returns a normalized LectureProblem with stable problemId, title, prompt, source, objectives, constraints, and evidence refs.

testCases.title: SolutionStep compiles into LectureSequenceStep
testCases.expectedBehavior: buildSequenceContext maps every SolutionStep into exactly one LectureSequenceStep with required evidence and presenter checkpoints.

testCases.title: SequencerDraft proposes frame edits without runtime mutation
testCases.expectedBehavior: createSequencerDraft returns proposed SequencerEdit records only; it does not mutate seq-data.json, seq-frames.json, or generated presenter artifacts.

testCases.title: Presenter readiness fails closed without evidence
testCases.expectedBehavior: runPresenterReadinessCheck returns needs-evidence when required checkpoint evidence is missing.

testCases.title: Governance passes when draft is approved and evidenced
testCases.expectedBehavior: evaluateLectureGovernance returns pass when the sequence covers every solution step, the draft has edits, evidence is present, and teacher approval is approved.
